zh.Henley on Thames, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾亨利--坦斯
zh.Stonor, Oxford, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Stonor II於1424年3月23日出生在英國奧可福爾斯頓時，他的父親Thomas Stonor29歲，母親Alice Kirby34歲。他於大約1455年與Joan de la Pole在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年4月23日在英國奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾斯頓。

zh-hans.Henley on Thames, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾亨利--坦斯
zh-hans.Stonor, Oxford, England: 英国英格兰奧可福爾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Stonor II于1424年3月23日出生在英国奧可福爾斯頓时，他的父亲Thomas Stonor29岁，母亲Alice Kirby34岁。他于大约1455年与Joan de la Pole在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年4月23日在英国奧可福爾亨利--坦斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Stonor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stoner
meanings: English (Sussex): topographic name from Middle English ston(e) ‘stone’ + -er, used for someone who lived by a prominent rock or stone, or perhaps who came from a place called Stone, although this formation is more rare. See Stone and compare Stoneman .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Steiner  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Stonor II was born on 23 March 1424, in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Stonor, was 29 and his mother, Alice Kirby, was 34. He married Joan de la Pole about 1455, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 23 April 1474, in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Stonor II est né le 23 mars 1424, à Stonor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stonor, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Kirby, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Joan de la Pole environ 1455, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1474, à Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Stonor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Stonor II am 23. März 1424 in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Stonor 29 und seine Mutter Alice Kirby 34. Er hat um 1455 in Oxfordshire, England Joan de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1474 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Stonor, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stonor II è nato il il 23 marzo 1424 nel Stonor, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Stonor, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Kirby, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Joan de la Pole circa 1455, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1474, nel Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Stonor, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.Henley on Thames, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムス
ja.Stonor, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノー
ja.Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイア
ja.Stonor, Oxford, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノー
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Stonor IIが1424年3月23日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノーで生まれた時，父Thomas Stonorは29歳，母Alice Kirbyは34歳であった。約1455年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJoan de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年4月23日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘンリー-オン-サムスで50歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Stonor II(이)가 1424년 3월 23일 영국 스퍼드실르 스토너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stonor(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Kirby(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1455년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Joan de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 4월 23일 영국 스퍼드실르 헨리--섬스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스토너에 묻혔다.

mn.23 March 1424–23 Apr 1474: 1424 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 23–1474 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23
mn.Stonor, Oxford, England: Stonor, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.23 March 1424–23 Apr 1474: 23 de março de 1424–23 de abril de 1474
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Stonor II nasceu em 23 de março de 1424, em Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Stonor, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Kirby, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de la Pole aproximadamente 1455, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1474, em Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Stonor II родился 23 марта 1424 г. в местности стонор, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Stonor было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Kirby, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de la Pole около 1455 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 апреля 1474 г. в местности хенли-он-тамесь, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности стонор, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.23 March 1424–23 Apr 1474: 23 de marzo de 1424–23 de abril de 1474
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Stonor II nació el 23 de marzo de 1424, en Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Stonor, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Kirby, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Joan de la Pole aproximadamente 1455, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1474, en Henley-on-Thames, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Stonor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
